title: Rename Elytra
description: This resource pack will allow you to rename the elytras to get them as an application or website
body:
This resource pack will allow you to rename the elytras to get them as an application or website

This will help you distribute players such as: YouTubers, Twich Streamers, TikTokers, etc. visually with the help of elytra, or maybe you just wanted to wear elytra on yourself in the form of an application or website
